title: Senior Doctor - Dr. Reddy's Laboratories International Enterprises - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Dr. Reddy's Laboratories International Enterprises - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
We at Dr. Reddy's Laboratories International Enterprises are looking for an experienced Senior Doctor based out of Bengaluru. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Dr. Reddy's Laboratories International Enterprises:
Dr. Reddy's Laboratories International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dr. Reddy's Laboratories International Enterprises!
